mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TBL_COM_PROCESS
PROCESSNM LIKE #{search}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_PROCESS ( PROCESSCD, LINECD, FACTORYCD, PROCESSNM, CONTENTS, USEYN, MOLDYN, OEMYN, EXTERNALBARCODEYN, MANUALGENERATEYN, INSPECT_CREATEREPORTYN, INSPECT_APPLYFAILYN, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM ) VALUES ( #{PROCESSCD}, #{LINECD}, #{FACTORYCD}, #{PROCESSNM}, #{CONTENTS}, #{USEYN}, #{MOLDYN}, #{OEMYN}, #{EXTERNALBARCODEYN}, #{MANUALGENERATEYN}, #{INSPECT_CREATEREPORTYN}, #{INSPECT_APPLYFAILYN}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_COM_PROCESS SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE PROCESSCD = #{PROCESSCD}
